site.title: enpiistudio — Discover, develop, display
site.description: Solo studio · Digital works and process notes. Built with programming precision and intentional design craft.

errors.subtitle500: Oops, something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
errors.body500: Try again in a moment or return to the catalog.
errors.subtitle404: Oops, this page could not be found. It may have been moved or removed.

footer.tagline: Solo studio · Digital works & process notes
footer.copyright: © {year} enpiistudio. Every work here is made on purpose.

home.heroSubtitle: Three words, one workflow. A digital works marketplace from a solo studio that blends programming precision with intentional design craft.
home.pillarsSubtitle: How we think, make, and share.
home.pillarDiscoverBody: Short research, many prototypes discarded. What remains is the most honest.
home.pillarDevelopBody: Source code, licenses, and bundles. Written on purpose — not frameworks passing through.
home.pillarDisplayBody: A journal of thoughts and process. Notes that still show how they were made.
home.featuredSubtitle: The latest picks from Develop—finished and ready to use.
home.featuredFallback: A digital artifact from enpii studio, ready to use and build upon.

discover.title: Discover
discover.subtitle: Work that starts from curiosity, not a client brief.
discover.storyTitle: "Code is a material, not a delivery mechanism."
discover.storyBody1: enpiistudio began as a private space — a place to keep experiments too specific for a client portfolio, too honest to hide behind false polish.
discover.storyBody2: I believe programming and design aren't two separate disciplines, but the same habit: choosing on purpose, rejecting defaults, reading documentation to the last line.
discover.storyBody3: The work here is a snapshot of that process — not a finished product, but artifacts that still show how they were made.
discover.pillarDiscoverBody: Exploration of form and function. Short research, many prototypes discarded — what remains is the most honest.
discover.pillarDevelopBody: Technical artifacts and digital tools. Code written on purpose — not frameworks passing through.
discover.pillarDisplayBody: A journal of thoughts and process. Notes that still show how they were made — not a repolished portfolio.
discover.valuesSubtitle: Seven stamps on the workbench. Not every project fits all of them — but this is how we work when we work.
discover.ctaBody: Browse the Develop catalog — source code, licenses, and bundles already released. Download, use, or let them be a reference.

develop.title: Develop
develop.listSubtitle: Things I’ve built—tools, systems, and products from the studio. Not a storefront, but a working notebook whose artifacts happen to be available.
develop.empty: There are no artifacts on this shelf yet.
develop.noResultsHint: Try another keyword or reset the search.
develop.emptyHint: The first piece will appear here when it’s ready to share.
develop.footerTitle: See how these works are made.
develop.loadError: Failed to load. Please try again.
develop.divider1: Built with intention, not on demand.
develop.divider2: Price is only a number; value lies in the work behind it.
develop.divider3: Some pieces here are still being explored.
develop.fallbackDescription: A digital artifact from enpii studio.

developDetail.galleryHint: Select a thumbnail to view the full-size image.
developDetail.finalTitle: Add it to your cart or browse other works.
developDetail.addError: Failed to add the product to your cart.

displayList.title: Display
displayList.subtitle: Brief notes from the workbench.
displayList.subtitleLong: Notes from the studio — process, thoughts, and things in progress. Not release notes. Not a weekly newsletter. This is a working notebook that happens to be published.
displayList.hintNoResults: Try another keyword, or browse all notes.
displayList.hintEmpty: The first note will appear here once published from the admin dashboard. Be patient — or head back to develop first.
displayList.footerBody: No fixed schedule. No editorial calendar. If there's something interesting in process, it's written here — if not, it isn't.

displayPost.fallbackCover: No cover image—the content speaks for itself.
displayPost.finalTitle: Head back to the shelf or see the latest work.

katalog.title: Catalog
katalog.subtitle: All available Develop works.
katalog.resetFilterHint: Try changing the filter or search keyword.
katalog.adminHint: Add works from the admin dashboard to get started.

reactions.question: Was this note helpful?
reactions.description: No analytics or comments—just a quick response so I know whether this note was clear.
reactions.improve: Okay—noted. I’ll make the next note clearer.

keranjang.title: Cart
keranjang.subtitle: Review your selections before checkout.
keranjang.trustNoteBody: Each piece is crafted individually—not mass-produced from templates. After payment, download links and license keys, if included, will be sent to the email address and WhatsApp number you provide at checkout.
keranjang.emptyBody: Your cart is empty. Browse Develop and choose whatever catches your eye.

payment.listSubtitle: Configure Tripay — the payment gateway for QRIS and virtual accounts. Credentials are stored encrypted; only mode and channel toggles are safe to edit.

payment.fieldMerchantHint: Merchant code from your Tripay dashboard.

payment.fieldApiKeyHintNew: Stored encrypted. Never displayed after saving.
payment.fieldPrivateKeyHintNew: For signature generation. NEVER share with anyone.
payment.fieldModeHint: Pick sandbox for testing, production for live.

maintenance.listSubtitle: Store mode. Turn it on for big deploys, database maintenance, or anything that requires the store to be temporarily offline.
maintenance.statusActiveHint: Visitors see a 503 page. Only admins can bypass.
maintenance.statusInactiveHint: Store runs normally. Customers can check out as usual.
maintenance.fieldMessageHint: Text shown to customers during maintenance.
maintenance.confirmMessage: Customers won't be able to access the store. New orders will be rejected until this mode is turned off. Are you sure?
